2026-05-23T15:57:00.CONTENT_EN: All car parks at West Kowloon Cultural District are full. Members of the public are encouraged to take public transport to the West Kowloon Cultural District.
2026-05-23T15:57:00.CONTENT_CN: 西九文化區內所有停車場現已泊滿車輛，前往西九文化區一帶的市民請使用公共交通工具。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) adds temporary train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車服務

2026-05-23T16:58:00.CONTENT_EN: In response to demand, the following temporary train trips will be added: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station ● 25 May: G9678, G9684 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station ● 25 May: G5680, G9540 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station ● 23 May: G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868 ● 24 May: G5834, G5836, G5838, G5840, G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868 ● 25 May: G5866, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868 From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station ● 23 May: G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867 ● 24 May: G5833, G5835, G5837, G5839, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867 ● 25 May: G5865, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867 From Shenzhenbei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station ● 25 May: G5679 From Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station ● 23 May: G9677, G9683, G9539 Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app; appointed travel agents (Click here); or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. For train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app, or the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Hong Kong West Kowloon Station Public Car Park now full
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 香港西九龍站公眾停車場現已泊滿

2026-05-23T19:25:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that the Hong Kong West Kowloon Station Public Car Park is now full. Please use public transport to reach the station.
2026-05-23T19:25:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，香港西九龍站公眾停車場現已泊滿。請使用公共交通工具前往。

2026-05-24T10:08:00.CONTENT_EN: Hong Kong West Kowloon Station Public Car Park is now full. Please use public transport to reach the station.
2026-05-24T10:08:00.CONTENT_CN: 香港西九龍站公眾停車場現已泊滿。請使用公共交通工具前往。

2026-05-25T10:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department announces that the traffic on Sai Kung Man Yee Road leading to High Island Reservoir East Dam is anticipated to be quite busy in general. The operator of Green Minibus Route No. 9A will strengthen its service to cater for passenger demand as necessary. Members of the public are advised to plan ahead their journeys, reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing.
2026-05-25T10:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署表示，通往萬宜水庫東壩的西貢萬宜路交通預計一般比較繁忙，專線小巴第9A號線的營辦商會按需要加強服務應付乘客需求。請遊人妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。

2026-05-25T11:07:00.CONTENT_EN: Hong Kong West Kowloon Station Public Car Park is now full. Please use public transport to reach the station.
2026-05-25T11:07:00.CONTENT_CN: 香港西九龍站公眾停車場現已泊滿。請使用公共交通工具前往。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: The vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port busy
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往香港方向)的車輛通關廣場繁忙

2026-05-25T16:16:00.CONTENT_EN: The vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port is very busy now. Members of the public who plan to drive their private cars back to Hong Kong via HZMB are advised to plan ahead their journeys, reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing. The public can check the real time situation of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts "hzmbzhport" or "zhuhaifabu" (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)(Chineseonly) before starting their journeys.
2026-05-25T16:16:00.CONTENT_CN: 港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往香港方向)的車輛通關廣場現時非常繁忙，計劃駕駛私家車經大橋返港的市民請妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。市民可於開始行程前透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況。
